detail.description:
Prepare yourself for an exhilarating journey into the heart of the wilderness with Animal Hunter: Wild Shooting. In this action-packed FPS game, you'll step into the boots of a skilled marksman, ready to engage in intense battles against the most cunning and elusive prey – deer. Get ready to embark on the ultimate deer hunting adventure where your combat skills will be put to the test.

Features:

Deer Hunting Challenge: Immerse yourself in the thrill of the hunt as you track down majestic deer
